parameters.text:
PM Documentation & DB Analyzer Bot
Powered by Ollama mistral:7b

Menu Bantuan
1. Upload file PM
Kirim file hasil script Generate PM MariaDB ke:
/home/bajau/pm_source/

2. /list - Tampilkan file TAR bernomor dari pm_source

3. /pm [nomor atau namafile.tar] - Analisis PM, simpan Markdown, dan buat Google Docs otomatis
Contoh: /pm 1
Atau: /pm DRFRAUDDBS1_pm-bajau_2026-04-16_111602.tar.gz

4. /pm [nomor atau namafile.tar] --docx - Opsi lama; output utama tetap Google Docs dan Markdown
Contoh: /pm 1 --docx

5. /gendoc [nomor/file.md] - Generate HTML dari laporan Markdown
Contoh: /gendoc 1

6. /gendoc [nomor/file.md] --md - Kirim ulang Markdown hasil laporan
Contoh: /gendoc 1 --md

7. /gendoc [nomor/file.md] --client="Nama Client" - Isi nama client pada dokumen

8. /listdocs - Daftar file .html/.md yang tersimpan di /home/bajau/pm_docs

9. /ask [pertanyaan] - Tanya dokumen PM dengan RAG

10. /analyze - Analisis real-time resource sistem dan database

11. /help - Tampilkan menu bantuan ini
={{ '[ERROR - PM]\n' + ($json.error?.message || $json.error || $json.message || 'Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui saat memproses workflow PM.') }}
={{ '[ERROR - Analyze]\n' + ($json.error?.message || 'Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui saat menganalisis sistem.') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const BAJAU_LOGO_DATA_URI = "data:image/png;base64,";

const pmData = $('Parse OS Info & Build PM Prompt').first().json;
const aiResp = $input.first().json?.response || $input.first().json?.error || '';
const sections = pmData.sections || {};
const focused = pmData.focusedFacts || {};
const chatId = pmData.chatId || $('Extract Message Meta').first().json.chat_id;
const fileName = pmData.fileName || focused.sourceArchive || 'unknown';
function stableHostname(...candidates) {
  for (const candidate of candidates) {
    const value = String(candidate || '').trim();
    if (!value || /^n\/?a$/i.test(value)) continue;
    if (/^(database host|database_host|db host|mysql host|localhost|unknown)$/i.test(value)) continue;
    if (/\$\{[^}]+\}/.test(value)) continue;
    return value;
  }
  return String(fileName).split('_')[0] || 'SERVER';
}
const hostname = stableHostname(pmData.hostname, focused.serverInformation?.hostname, String(fileName).split('_')[0], 'SERVER');
const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
const collectionProfile = pmData.collectionProfile || focused.collectionProfile || 'Script GENERATE PM MARIADB V2.0';
const requiredFiles = pmData.requiredFiles || [];
const presentFiles = pmData.presentFiles || focused.dataCoverage?.presentFiles || requiredFiles.filter((file) => sections[file]);
const missingFiles = pmData.missingFiles || focused.dataCoverage?.missingFiles || requiredFiles.filter((file) => !sections[file]);

function sanitizeReportText(value) {
  return String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/\$\{MYSQL_HOST\}/g, 'database host')
    .replace(/\$\{MYSQL_PORT\}/g, 'database port')
    .replace(/\$\{MYSQL_USER\}/g, 'database user')
    .replace(/\$\{MYSQL_PASSWORD\}/g, 'database password')
    .replace(/\$\{MYSQL_DATABASE\}/g, 'database name')
    .replace(/\$\{DB_HOST\}/g, 'database host')
    .replace(/\$\{DB_PORT\}/g, 'database port')
    .replace(/\$\{DB_USER\}/g, 'database user')
    .replace(/\$\{DB_PASSWORD\}/g, 'database password')
    .replace(/\$\{([A-Z0-9_]+)\}/g, '$1');
}

function clean(value, maxLen) {
  const text = sanitizeReportText(value)
    .replace(/[\x00-\x08\x0B\x0C\x0E-\x1F\x7F]/g, '')
    .replace(/\r/g, '')
    .replace(/\t/g, '    ')
    .trim();
  return maxLen && text.length > maxLen ? text.slice(0, maxLen) + '\n...[dipotong agar aman untuk Google Docs]...' : text;
}

function esc(value) {
  return clean(value)
    .replace(/&/g, '&')
    .replace(/</g, '<')
    .replace(/>/g, '>')
    .replace(/"/g, '"')
    .replace(/'/g, ''')
    .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
}

function plain(value, fallback) {
  const text = clean(value);
  return text || fallback || 'N/A';
}

function parseKv(text) {
  const out = {};
  for (const line of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const trimmed = line.trim();
    if (!trimmed) continue;
    let match = trimmed.match(/^([A-Za-z0-9_.$-]+)\s*[:=]\s*(.+)$/);
    if (!match) {
      const parts = trimmed.split(/\s+/);
      if (parts.length >= 2 && /^[A-Za-z0-9_.$-]+$/.test(parts[0])) match = [trimmed, parts[0], parts.slice(1).join(' ')];
    }
    if (match) out[match[1]] = match[2];
  }
  return out;
}

function parseSlave(text) {
  const out = {};
  for (const line of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const match = line.match(/^\s*([A-Za-z0-9_]+):\s*(.*)$/);
    if (match) out[match[1]] = match[2].trim();
  }
  return out;
}

function asInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9.-]/g, ''));
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
}

function numericValue(value) {
  const n = Number(String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9.-]/g, ''));
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
}

function formatPct(value, decimals) {
  const n = numericValue(value);
  if (n === null) return 'N/A';
  const fixed = Number(n.toFixed(decimals ?? (Math.abs(n) < 10 ? 2 : 1)));
  return String(fixed) + '%';
}

function formatDataSize(value) {
  const raw = String(value ?? '').trim();
  if (!raw || /^n\/?a$/i.test(raw)) return 'N/A';
  if (/[KMGTPE]i?B?$/i.test(raw) || /bytes?$/i.test(raw)) return raw;
  const n = numericValue(raw);
  if (n === null) return raw;
  const gb = n / (1024 * 1024 * 1024);
  if (gb >= 1) return String(Number(gb.toFixed(2))) + ' GB';
  const mb = n / (1024 * 1024);
  if (mb >= 1) return String(Number(mb.toFixed(2))) + ' MB';
  const kb = n / 1024;
  if (kb >= 1) return String(Number(kb.toFixed(2))) + ' KB';
  return String(n) + ' B';
}

function secondsHuman(value) {
  const n = asInt(value, NaN);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return value || 'N/A';
  const days = Math.floor(n / 86400);
  const hours = Math.floor((n % 86400) / 3600);
  const minutes = Math.floor((n % 3600) / 60);
  return days + ' days, ' + hours + ' hours, ' + minutes + ' minutes';
}

function table(headers, rows, cls) {
  const normalizedRows = (rows && rows.length ? rows : [headers.map(() => 'N/A')])
    .map((row) => Array.from({ length: headers.length }, (_, idx) => row[idx] ?? ''));
  const th = headers.map((header) => '<th>' + esc(header) + '</th>').join('');
  const trs = normalizedRows.map((row) => '<tr>' + row.map((cell) => '<td>' + esc(cell) + '</td>').join('') + '</tr>').join('');
  return '<table class="doc-table ' + esc(cls || '') + '"><thead><tr>' + th + '</tr></thead><tbody>' + trs + '</tbody></table>';
}

function kvTable(rows, cls) {
  return table(['Item', 'Value'], rows, cls || 'kv');
}

function statusClass(value) {
  const text = String(value || '').toLowerCase();
  if (/critical|not synced|not running|failed|high|over|warning|lag|review/.test(text)) return 'bad';
  if (/n\/a|unknown|-/.test(text)) return 'muted';
  return 'ok';
}

function badge(value) {
  return '<span class="badge ' + statusClass(value) + '">' + esc(value || 'N/A') + '</span>';
}

function bar(label, value, maxValue, suffix) {
  const n = Math.max(0, Math.min(Number(value || 0), Number(maxValue || 100)));
  const pct = maxValue ? Math.round((n / maxValue) * 100) : 0;
  return '<div class="bar-row"><div class="bar-label">' + esc(label) + '</div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill ' + (pct >= 80 ? 'bar-warn' : 'bar-ok') + '" style="width:' + Math.min(pct, 100) + '%"></div></div><div class="bar-value">' + esc(String(value || 'N/A') + (suffix || '')) + '</div></div>';
}
function parseSarDateToken(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  let m = raw.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{1,2})$/);
  if (m) return { key: m[1] + '-' + m[2].padStart(2, '0') + '-' + m[3].padStart(2, '0'), date: new Date(Number(m[1]), Number(m[2]) - 1, Number(m[3])) };

  m = raw.match(/^(\d{1,2})[/-](\d{1,2})[/-](\d{2,4})$/);
  if (!m) return { key: raw || 'N/A', date: null };
  let a = Number(m[1]);
  let b = Number(m[2]);
  let y = Number(m[3]);
  if (y < 100) y += 2000;
  let month = a;
  let day = b;
  if (a > 12 && b <= 12) {
    day = a;
    month = b;
  }
  const date = new Date(y, month - 1, day);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return { key: raw, date: null };
  return { key: y + '-' + String(month).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(day).padStart(2, '0'), date };
}

function parseSarHeaderDate(line) {
  const matches = String(line || '').match(/\b\d{4}-\d{1,2}-\d{1,2}\b|\b\d{1,2}[/-]\d{1,2}[/-]\d{2,4}\b/g) || [];
  if (!matches.length) return { key: '', date: null };
  return parseSarDateToken(matches[matches.length - 1]);
}

function parseSarTime(line) {
  const match = String(line || '').match(/\b(\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?)\s*(AM|PM)?\b/i);
  if (!match) return { label: '', hours: 0, minutes: 0, seconds: 0 };
  const parts = match[1].split(':').map((part) => Number(part));
  let hours = parts[0] || 0;
  const minutes = parts[1] || 0;
  const seconds = parts[2] || 0;
  const ampm = (match[2] || '').toUpperCase();
  if (ampm === 'PM' && hours < 12) hours += 12;
  if (ampm === 'AM' && hours === 12) hours = 0;
  return { label: match[1].slice(0, 5), hours, minutes, seconds };
}

function sampleTimestamp(dateInfo, timeInfo) {
  if (!dateInfo || !dateInfo.date) return null;
  const d = new Date(dateInfo.date.getTime());
  d.setHours(timeInfo.hours || 0, timeInfo.minutes || 0, timeInfo.seconds || 0, 0);
  return d;
}

function numberAt(parts, index) {
  const n = Number(String(parts[index] ?? '').replace(',', '.'));
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
}

function parseSarMetricSamples(text, metric) {
  const lines = String(text || '').split('\n');
  let currentDate = { key: '', date: null };
  let cpuIdleOffset = null;
  let memPctIndex = null;
  const samples = [];

  for (const rawLine of lines) {
    const line = rawLine.trim();
    if (!line) continue;

    if (/^Linux\b/i.test(line) || /\b\d{1,2}[/-]\d{1,2}[/-]\d{2,4}\b|\b\d{4}-\d{1,2}-\d{1,2}\b/.test(line)) {
      const headerDate = parseSarHeaderDate(line);
      if (headerDate.key) currentDate = headerDate;
    }

    const parts = line.split(/\s+/);
    const cpuHeaderIdx = parts.findIndex((part) => part === 'CPU');
    if (cpuHeaderIdx >= 0 && parts.includes('%idle')) {
      const header = parts.slice(cpuHeaderIdx);
      cpuIdleOffset = header.indexOf('%idle');
      continue;
    }

    const memHeaderIdx = parts.findIndex((part) => part === '%memused' || part === '%commit');
    if (memHeaderIdx >= 0 && parts.some((part) => /kbmem|memused|%mem/i.test(part))) {
      memPctIndex = parts.findIndex((part) => part === '%memused');
      if (memPctIndex < 0) memPctIndex = memHeaderIdx;
      continue;
    }

    if (/^Average:/i.test(line)) continue;

    const time = parseSarTime(line);
    if (!time.label) continue;

    if (metric === 'cpu' && cpuIdleOffset !== null) {
      const allIdx = parts.findIndex((part) => part === 'all');
      if (allIdx < 0) continue;
      const idle = numberAt(parts, allIdx + cpuIdleOffset);
      if (idle === null) continue;
      const ts = sampleTimestamp(currentDate, time);
      samples.push({
        label: (currentDate.key ? currentDate.key + ' ' : '') + time.label,
        day: currentDate.key || '',
        timestamp: ts ? ts.getTime() : null,
        value: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number((100 - idle).toFixed(2))))
      });
    }

    if (metric === 'memory' && memPctIndex !== null) {
      const value = numberAt(parts, memPctIndex);
      if (value === null) continue;
      const ts = sampleTimestamp(currentDate, time);
      samples.push({
        label: (currentDate.key ? currentDate.key + ' ' : '') + time.label,
        day: currentDate.key || '',
        timestamp: ts ? ts.getTime() : null,
        value: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(value.toFixed(2))))
      });
    }
  }

  return samples;
}

function filterLastDays(samples, days) {
  const dated = samples.filter((sample) => Number.isFinite(sample.timestamp));
  if (!dated.length) return samples;
  const maxTs = Math.max(...dated.map((sample) => sample.timestamp));
  const cutoff = maxTs - (Number(days || 30) * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  return samples.filter((sample) => !Number.isFinite(sample.timestamp) || sample.timestamp >= cutoff);
}

function reduceMetricSeries(samples, maxPoints) {
  const dated = samples.filter((sample) => sample.day);
  const uniqueDays = [...new Set(dated.map((sample) => sample.day))];
  if (uniqueDays.length > 1) {
    return uniqueDays.map((day) => {
      const points = dated.filter((sample) => sample.day === day);
      const avg = points.reduce((sum, sample) => sum + sample.value, 0) / Math.max(points.length, 1);
      return {
        label: day.slice(5),
        day,
        timestamp: points[points.length - 1]?.timestamp || null,
        value: Number(avg.toFixed(2)),
        count: points.length
      };
    });
  }

  if (samples.length <= maxPoints) return samples;
  const bucketSize = Math.ceil(samples.length / maxPoints);
  const out = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < samples.length; i += bucketSize) {
    const bucket = samples.slice(i, i + bucketSize);
    const avg = bucket.reduce((sum, sample) => sum + sample.value, 0) / Math.max(bucket.length, 1);
    const last = bucket[bucket.length - 1] || {};
    out.push({ ...last, value: Number(avg.toFixed(2)), count: bucket.length });
  }
  return out;
}

function buildSarMetricSeries(text, metric, days) {
  const raw = parseSarMetricSamples(text, metric);
  const filtered = filterLastDays(raw, days);
  const series = reduceMetricSeries(filtered, 90);
  const dated = filtered.filter((sample) => sample.day);
  const period = dated.length
    ? dated[0].day + (dated[dated.length - 1].day !== dated[0].day ? ' - ' + dated[dated.length - 1].day : '')
    : '30 hari terakhir / data timestamp tidak tersedia';
  return { raw, filtered, series, period };
}

function metricStats(seriesData) {
  const values = (seriesData.series || []).map((sample) => sample.value).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
  if (!values.length) return null;
  const min = Math.min(...values);
  const max = Math.max(...values);
  const avg = values.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / values.length;
  return {
    min: Number(min.toFixed(2)),
    max: Number(max.toFixed(2)),
    avg: Number(avg.toFixed(2)),
    points: values.length,
    rawPoints: seriesData.filtered.length,
    period: seriesData.period
  };
}

function escXml(value) {
  return String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/&/g, '&')
    .replace(/</g, '<')
    .replace(/>/g, '>')
    .replace(/"/g, '"');
}

function svgDataUri(svg) {
  return 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,' + Buffer.from(svg, 'utf8').toString('base64');
}

function areaChartSvg(title, seriesData, unit) {
  const series = seriesData.series || [];
  if (!series.length) return '';
  const width = 760;
  const height = 250;
  const left = 54;
  const right = 24;
  const top = 34;
  const bottom = 36;
  const chartW = width - left - right;
  const chartH = height - top - bottom;
  const maxValue = Math.max(100, Math.ceil(Math.max(...series.map((point) => point.value)) / 10) * 10);
  const points = series.map((point, idx) => {
    const x = left + (series.length === 1 ? chartW / 2 : (idx / (series.length - 1)) * chartW);
    const y = top + chartH - (point.value / maxValue) * chartH;
    return { ...point, x, y };
  });
  const line = points.map((point) => point.x.toFixed(1) + ',' + point.y.toFixed(1)).join(' ');
  const area = left + ',' + (top + chartH) + ' ' + line + ' ' + (left + chartW) + ',' + (top + chartH);
  const grid = [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((ratio) => {
    const y = top + chartH - ratio * chartH;
    const value = Math.round(ratio * maxValue);
    return '<line x1="' + left + '" y1="' + y.toFixed(1) + '" x2="' + (left + chartW) + '" y2="' + y.toFixed(1) + '" stroke="#e5e7eb"/><text x="' + (left - 8) + '" y="' + (y + 4).toFixed(1) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" fill="#53606b">' + value + '</text>';
  }).join('');
  const labelIdx = [...new Set([0, Math.floor((points.length - 1) / 2), points.length - 1])];
  const labels = labelIdx.map((idx) => {
    const point = points[idx];
    return '<text x="' + point.x.toFixed(1) + '" y="' + (height - 10) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#53606b">' + escXml(point.label) + '</text>';
  }).join('');
  const circles = points.map((point) => '<circle cx="' + point.x.toFixed(1) + '" cy="' + point.y.toFixed(1) + '" r="3.2" fill="#08bcd4" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1.6"/>').join('');
  const svg = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="' + width + '" height="' + height + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + width + ' ' + height + '">' +
    '<rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#ffffff"/>' +
    '<text x="' + left + '" y="20" font-family="Roboto,Arial,sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#374151">' + escXml(title) + '</text>' +
    grid +
    '<polygon points="' + area + '" fill="#8ee5ef" opacity="0.78"/>' +
    '<polyline points="' + line + '" fill="none" stroke="#08bcd4" stroke-width="2.2"/>' +
    circles +
    labels +
    '<text x="' + (width - 24) + '" y="20" text-anchor="end" font-family="Roboto,Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#6b7280">' + escXml(unit) + '</text>' +
    '</svg>';
  return '<img class="metric-chart" alt="' + esc(title) + '" src="' + svgDataUri(svg) + '">';
}

function metricSummaryText(label, seriesData, unit) {
  const stats = metricStats(seriesData);
  if (!stats) return '<div class="metric-caption">' + esc(label) + ': N/A</div>';
  return '<div class="metric-caption">Avg ' + esc(String(stats.avg) + unit) + ' | Max ' + esc(String(stats.max) + unit) + ' | Period ' + esc(stats.period) + '</div>';
}

function metricChartBlock(title, seriesData, unit, fallbackText) {
  if (!seriesData.series || !seriesData.series.length) {
    return '<div class="ai-box">Data ' + esc(title) + ' 30 hari tidak ditemukan pada SAR. Evidence tersedia:<br>' + esc(fallbackText || 'N/A') + '</div>';
  }
  return '<div class="metric-chart-wrap">' + areaChartSvg(title, seriesData, unit) + metricSummaryText(title, seriesData, unit) + '</div>';
}


function allText(matchRe) {
  return Object.entries(sections)
    .filter(([key]) => matchRe.test(key))
    .map(([key, value]) => '--- ' + key + ' ---\n' + value)
    .join('\n\n');
}

function firstMatch(text, patterns, fallback) {
  for (const re of patterns) {
    const match = String(text || '').match(re);
    if (match) return clean(match[1] || match[2] || match[0], 300).replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
  }
  return fallback || 'N/A';
}

function firstIp(text) {
  const matches = String(text || '').match(/\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b/g) || [];
  return matches.find((ip) => !/^(127|0|255)\./.test(ip) && ip !== '255.255.255.255') || 'N/A';
}

function firstMac(text) {
  const match = String(text || '').match(/\b[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}(?::[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}){5}\b/);
  return match ? match[0] : 'N/A';
}

function parseDiskRows(text) {
  const rows = [];
  for (const line of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const trimmed = line.trim();
    if (!/\s\d{1,3}%\s/.test(' ' + trimmed + ' ')) continue;
    const parts = trimmed.split(/\s+/);
    const pctIdx = parts.findIndex((part) => /^\d{1,3}%$/.test(part));
    if (pctIdx < 4) continue;
    rows.push({
      filesystem: parts.slice(0, pctIdx - 3).join(' ') || parts[0],
      size: parts[pctIdx - 3] || 'N/A',
      used: parts[pctIdx - 2] || 'N/A',
      free: parts[pctIdx - 1] || 'N/A',
      pct: parts[pctIdx] || 'N/A',
      mount: parts.slice(pctIdx + 1).join(' ') || 'N/A'
    });
  }
  return rows.slice(0, 20);
}

function parseDateRange(text) {
  const matches = String(text || '').match(/\b\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\b|\b\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{2,4}\b|\b\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2,4}\b/g) || [];
  const uniq = [...new Set(matches)];
  if (!uniq.length) return 'N/A';
  return uniq[0] + (uniq.length > 1 ? ' - ' + uniq[uniq.length - 1] : '');
}

function firstLine(value, fallback) {
  return clean(value || '', 1000).split('\n').find(Boolean) || fallback || 'N/A';
}

function formatDateId(isoDate) {
  const monthNames = ['Januari', 'Februari', 'Maret', 'April', 'Mei', 'Juni', 'Juli', 'Agustus', 'September', 'Oktober', 'November', 'Desember'];
  const d = new Date(isoDate + 'T00:00:00');
  if (Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return isoDate;
  return String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' + monthNames[d.getMonth()] + ' ' + d.getFullYear();
}

function formatMonthYear(isoDate) {
  const monthNames = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];
  const d = new Date(isoDate + 'T00:00:00');
  if (Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return isoDate;
  return monthNames[d.getMonth()] + ' ' + d.getFullYear();
}

function isReportNoiseLine(value) {
  const line = docLine(value);
  if (!line) return true;
  if (/^(?:`{3}|#{1,6}\s*|={3,}|-{3,}|\*{3,})/.test(line)) return true;
  if (/^(mysql|mariadb|psql|export|sudo|apt|yum|dnf|docker|kubectl|systemctl)\b/i.test(line)) return true;
  if (/password|passwd|secret/i.test(line) && /\b(mysql|mariadb|user|host|port)\b/i.test(line)) return true;
  if (/^\s*(berikut|tentu|saya akan|berdasarkan data yang diberikan)\b/i.test(line)) return true;
  return false;
}

function cleanDocSentence(value, maxLen) {
  const text = docLine(clean(value || '', maxLen || 500));
  return text.replace(/^[-*?]\s*/, '').replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ').trim();
}

function simplifyRecommendation(value) {
  let text = cleanDocSentence(value, 360);
  text = text.replace(/^\[[^\]]+\]\s*/, '');
  text = text.replace(/\s*\([^)]*(?:bytes|byte|set global|query|sql)[^)]*\)\s*/ig, ' ');
  text = text.replace(/\bSET\s+GLOBAL\b[\s\S]*$/i, '').trim();
  text = text.replace(/\bconsider\b/i, 'Review');
  text = text.replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ').trim();
  if (!text) return 'Review konfigurasi terkait dan sesuaikan secara bertahap setelah validasi beban kerja.';
  if (text.length > 180) text = text.slice(0, 177).replace(/\s+\S*$/, '') + '...';
  return text;
}

function aiHtml(text) {
  const lines = clean(text || 'N/A', 24000)
    .split(/\n+/)
    .map((line) => cleanDocSentence(line, 520))
    .filter((line) => line && !isReportNoiseLine(line))
    .filter((line) => !/^\s*(AI Analysis and Recommendations|Hasil Analisis AI|Recommendations?|Recommended Adjustments)\s*:?$/i.test(line))
    .filter((line) => !/^\|?\s*-{2,}/.test(line) && !/^\|.*\|$/.test(line))
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^\d+[.)]\s*/, '').replace(/^[-*]\s*/, '').trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, 18);

  if (!lines.length) return '<div class="ai-box ai-analysis"><p>N/A</p></div>';
  return '<div class="ai-box ai-analysis"><ul>' + lines.map((line) => '<li>' + esc(line) + '</li>').join('') + '</ul></div>';
}

function stripAnsi(value) {
  return String(value || '').replace(/\x1B\[[0-?]*[ -/]*[@-~]/g, '');
}

function docLine(value) {
  return sanitizeReportText(stripAnsi(value))
    .replace(/[│┃]/g, '|')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();
}

function rawBlock(text, maxLen) {
  const value = clean(stripAnsi(text || 'N/A'), maxLen || 5000);
  return '<div class="raw-block">' + esc(value || 'N/A') + '</div>';
}

function splitTableLikeLine(line) {
  const raw = stripAnsi(line || '').trim();
  if (!raw || /^[+|\-= ]+$/.test(raw)) return [];
  if (raw.includes('|')) {
    return raw.split('|').map((part) => docLine(part)).filter(Boolean);
  }
  const wide = raw.split(/\t+|\s{2,}/).map((part) => docLine(part)).filter(Boolean);
  if (wide.length > 1) return wide;
  return raw.split(/\s+/).map((part) => docLine(part)).filter(Boolean);
}

function parseDbSizeRows(text) {
  const rows = [];
  for (const line of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const parts = splitTableLikeLine(line);
    if (parts.length < 2) continue;
    const joined = parts.join(' ').toLowerCase();
    if (/^(schema|database|table_schema|total|count|rows)\b/.test(joined) || /schema.*size/.test(joined)) continue;

    let schema = '';
    let tables = '';
    let size = '';

    if (/^\d+$/.test(parts[0]) && parts.length >= 3) {
      tables = parts[0];
      schema = parts[1];
      size = parts.slice(2).join(' ');
    } else if (parts.length >= 3 && /^\d+$/.test(parts[2])) {
      schema = parts[0];
      size = parts[1];
      tables = parts[2];
    } else {
      schema = parts[0];
      size = parts[1];
      tables = parts[2] || 'N/A';
    }

    if (!schema || /^[-]+$/.test(schema)) continue;
    rows.push([schema, tables || 'N/A', size || 'N/A']);
  }
  return rows.slice(0, 40);
}

function renderDatabaseSize(text) {
  const rows = parseDbSizeRows(text);
  if (!rows.length) return rawBlock(text || 'Data ukuran database tidak tersedia.', 5000);
  return '<div class="section-note">Ukuran database dirapikan dari output PM agar mudah dibaca di Google Docs.</div>' +
    table(['Schema', 'Table Count', 'Size'], rows, 'compact-table db-size-table');
}

function normalizeEngine(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').replace(/[,;]$/g, '').trim();
  const lower = raw.toLowerCase();
  const map = {
    innodb: 'InnoDB',
    myisam: 'MyISAM',
    aria: 'Aria',
    memory: 'MEMORY',
    heap: 'MEMORY',
    csv: 'CSV',
    archive: 'ARCHIVE',
    blackhole: 'BLACKHOLE',
    federated: 'FEDERATED',
    sequence: 'SEQUENCE',
    connect: 'CONNECT',
    tokudb: 'TokuDB',
    rocksdb: 'RocksDB',
    'mrg_myisam': 'MRG_MyISAM',
    'performance_schema': 'PERFORMANCE_SCHEMA',
  };
  return map[lower] || raw;
}

function isKnownEngine(value) {
  const engine = normalizeEngine(value);
  return /^(InnoDB|MyISAM|Aria|MEMORY|CSV|ARCHIVE|BLACKHOLE|FEDERATED|SEQUENCE|CONNECT|TokuDB|RocksDB|MRG_MyISAM|PERFORMANCE_SCHEMA)$/i.test(engine);
}

function parseTableEngineInventory(text) {
  const counts = {};
  const details = [];

  for (const line of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const parts = splitTableLikeLine(line);
    if (parts.length < 2) continue;
    const lower = parts.join(' ').toLowerCase();
    if (/table_schema|table_name|engine|jumlah|count/.test(lower) && /schema|name|engine|jumlah|count/.test(lower)) continue;

    if (isKnownEngine(parts[0]) && /^\d+$/.test(parts[1])) {
      const engine = normalizeEngine(parts[0]);
      counts[engine] = (counts[engine] || 0) + Number(parts[1]);
      continue;
    }

    let engineIdx = -1;
    for (let idx = parts.length - 1; idx >= 0; idx--) {
      if (isKnownEngine(parts[idx])) {
        engineIdx = idx;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (engineIdx < 0 && parts.length >= 2 && /^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]+$/.test(parts[parts.length - 1])) {
      engineIdx = parts.length - 1;
    }
    if (engineIdx < 0) continue;

    const engine = normalizeEngine(parts[engineIdx]);
    if (!engine || /^engine$/i.test(engine) || /^\d+$/.test(engine)) continue;

    const nameParts = parts.slice(0, engineIdx).filter((part) => part && !/^\d+$/.test(part));
    if (!nameParts.length) continue;
    const schema = nameParts.length > 1 ? nameParts[0] : 'N/A';
    const tableName = nameParts.length > 1 ? nameParts.slice(1).join(' ') : nameParts[0];
    if (!tableName || /^(table|table_name|schema|database)$/i.test(tableName)) continue;

    details.push({ schema, tableName, engine });
    counts[engine] = (counts[engine] || 0) + 1;
  }

  const total = Object.values(counts).reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0);
  const summaryRows = Object.entries(counts)
    .sort(([aEngine, aCount], [bEngine, bCount]) => {
      if (aEngine === 'InnoDB') return -1;
      if (bEngine === 'InnoDB') return 1;
      return bCount - aCount || aEngine.localeCompare(bEngine);
    })
    .map(([engine, count]) => [engine, String(count), total ? Number((count / total * 100).toFixed(1)) + '%' : '0%']);

  return { total, counts, summaryRows, details };
}

function renderTableEngineInventory(text) {
  const parsed = parseTableEngineInventory(text);
  if (!parsed.total) return rawBlock(text || 'Data table engine tidak tersedia.', 5000);

  const nonInno = parsed.details.filter((row) => row.engine !== 'InnoDB');
  const parts = [];
  parts.push('<div class="section-note">Inventory engine diringkas per engine. Detail non-InnoDB ditampilkan agar mudah ditindaklanjuti.</div>');
  parts.push(table(['Engine', 'Table Count', 'Percentage'], parsed.summaryRows, 'compact-table summary-table'));
  if (nonInno.length) {
    parts.push('<h3>Non-InnoDB Tables</h3>');
    parts.push(table(['Schema', 'Table', 'Engine'], nonInno.slice(0, 80).map((row) => [row.schema, row.tableName, row.engine]), 'compact-table table-engine-detail'));
    if (nonInno.length > 80) {
      parts.push('<p class="section-note">Ditampilkan 80 dari ' + esc(String(nonInno.length)) + ' table non-InnoDB. Detail lengkap tetap tersedia di data PM.</p>');
    }
  } else {
    parts.push('<p class="section-note">Semua table yang terbaca menggunakan InnoDB.</p>');
  }
  return parts.join('');
}

function parseMysqlTuner(text) {
  const findings = [];
  const recommendations = [];
  let mode = '';

  for (const rawLine of String(text || '').split('\n')) {
    const line = docLine(rawLine);
    if (!line || /^[*=#-]{3,}$/.test(line) || /^>>/.test(line)) continue;

    if (/variables to adjust|general recommendations|recommendations/i.test(line)) {
      mode = 'recommendations';
      continue;
    }

    const match = line.match(/^\[(OK|!!|--|WARN|FAIL|INFO)\]\s*(.*)$/i);
    if (match) {
      const token = match[1].toUpperCase();
      const status = token === 'OK' ? 'OK' : token === '!!' ? 'Review' : token === '--' ? 'Info' : token === 'FAIL' ? 'Critical' : 'Warning';
      const finding = match[2].trim();
      if (finding) findings.push([status, finding]);
      continue;
    }

    if (mode === 'recommendations' || /\b(recommend|adjust|increase|decrease|enable|disable|consider|set)\b/i.test(line)) {
      const rec = cleanDocSentence(line, 420);
      if (rec && !/mysqltuner/i.test(rec) && !isReportNoiseLine(rec)) recommendations.push([rec]);
    }
  }

  const priority = { Critical: 0, Review: 1, Warning: 2, OK: 3, Info: 4 };
  findings.sort((a, b) => (priority[a[0]] ?? 9) - (priority[b[0]] ?? 9));
  return { findings, recommendations };
}

function renderMysqlTuner(text) {
  const parsed = parseMysqlTuner(text);
  if (!parsed.findings.length && !parsed.recommendations.length) {
    return rawBlock(text || 'Data mysqltuner tidak tersedia.', 6000);
  }

  const counts = parsed.findings.reduce((acc, row) => {
    acc[row[0]] = (acc[row[0]] || 0) + 1;
    return acc;
  }, {});
  const countRows = ['Critical', 'Review', 'Warning', 'OK', 'Info']
    .filter((key) => counts[key])
    .map((key) => [key, String(counts[key])]);

  const parts = [];
  parts.push('<div class="section-note">Output mysqltuner diringkas agar hanya finding dan tindakan penting yang masuk ke dokumen.</div>');
  if (countRows.length) parts.push(table(['Status', 'Count'], countRows, 'compact-table summary-table mysqltuner-summary'));
  if (parsed.findings.length) {
    parts.push(table(['Status', 'Finding'], parsed.findings.slice(0, 45), 'compact-table mysqltuner-table'));
  }
  if (parsed.recommendations.length) {
    const rows = parsed.recommendations.slice(0, 12).map((row, idx) => [String(idx + 1), simplifyRecommendation(row[0])]);
    parts.push('<h3>Recommended Adjustments</h3>');
    parts.push(table(['No', 'Action'], rows, 'compact-table recommendation-table'));
  }
  return parts.join('');
}


function metricUsage(seriesData) {
  const stats = metricStats(seriesData);
  if (!stats) return { value: 'N/A', avg: null, max: null, remarks: 'Data SAR tidak tersedia.' };
  return {
    value: formatPct(stats.avg) + ' avg / ' + formatPct(stats.max) + ' max',
    avg: stats.avg,
    max: stats.max,
    remarks: 'Period ' + stats.period + '; ' + stats.points + ' plotted samples dari ' + stats.rawPoints + ' data SAR.'
  };
}

function statusByPct(value, warn, critical) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '' || value === 'N/A') return 'N/A';
  if (!Number.isFinite(Number(value))) return 'N/A';
  const n = Number(value);
  if (n >= critical) return 'Critical';
  if (n >= warn) return 'Review';
  return 'OK';
}

function highestDiskUsage() {
  let best = null;
  for (const row of diskRows || []) {
    const pct = asInt(row.pct, NaN);
    if (!Number.isFinite(pct)) continue;
    if (!best || pct > best.pct) best = { ...row, pct };
  }
  return best;
}

function compactEvidence(value, fallback) {
  const text = cleanDocSentence(value || '', 260);
  return text || fallback || 'N/A';
}

function isBackupNoiseLine(line) {
  const text = String(line || '').trim();
  if (!text) return true;
  if (/^[-_=#]{2,}$/.test(text)) return true;
  if (/^---\s*backup/i.test(text)) return true;
  if (/pm-bajau|script|mariabackup|xtrabackup|\/data\d*\/|\/var\/|\/home\/|\.sh\b|\.log\b|date \+|#!\/bin|^if\b|^fi\b|^then\b|^else\b|^echo\b|^sudo\b|^mkdir\b|^cp\b|^rsync\b|^tar\b|^find\b/i.test(text)) return true;
  if (/\$\{|&&|\|\||>>|<<|\bfunction\b/i.test(text)) return true;
  return false;
}

function parseBackupSummary(text) {
  const raw = clean(text || '', 2500);
  if (!raw || raw === 'N/A') return [];
  const allLines = raw.split('\n').map((line) => cleanDocSentence(line, 220)).filter(Boolean);
  const signalLines = allLines.filter((line) => !isBackupNoiseLine(line));
  const joined = signalLines.join(' ') || allLines.join(' ');
  const dateMatch = joined.match(/\b\d{4}[-/]\d{1,2}[-/]\d{1,2}(?:\s+\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?)?\b|\b\d{1,2}[-/]\d{1,2}[-/]\d{2,4}(?:\s+\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?)?\b/i);
  const hasFail = /fail|failed|error|aborted|corrupt|incomplete/i.test(joined);
  const hasOk = /success|successful|completed|complete|ok|done|finish|passed/i.test(joined);
  const status = hasFail ? 'Review' : (hasOk ? 'OK' : 'N/A');
  const lastRun = dateMatch ? dateMatch[0] : 'N/A';
  const type = /incremental/i.test(joined) ? 'Incremental Backup' : 'Full Backup';
  const remark = signalLines.length
    ? compactEvidence(signalLines.slice(0, 2).join(' '), 'Backup evidence tersedia pada PM archive.')
    : 'Backup evidence berisi script/path mentah; detail teknis diabaikan dari tabel ringkasan.';
  return [[hostname, type, status, lastRun, remark]];
}

'High' : 'Medium', 'Bersihkan data tidak perlu, review backup/manual dump, dan rencanakan capacity upgrade.', hostname, 'df/disk data']);
if (connPct >= 80) issues.push([String(issues.length + 1), 'Connection usage high', threadsConn + ' / ' + maxConn + ' (' + connPct + '%)', connPct >= 95 ? 'High' : 'Medium', 'Review connection pool, aplikasi idle connection, dan max_connections.', hostname, 'mariadb_glob_vars.txt']);
if (bpRatio < 99) issues.push([String(issues.length + 1), 'InnoDB buffer pool hit ratio below target', String(bpRatio) + '% target > 99%', bpRatio < 90 ? 'High' : 'Medium', 'Review innodb_buffer_pool_size dan working set database.', hostname, 'mariadb_glob_vars.txt']);
if (slowQueries > 100000) issues.push([String(issues.length + 1), 'Slow queries high', String(slowQueries) + ' slow queries', 'Medium', 'Review slow query log, index, dan query plan.', hostname, 'mariadb_glob_vars.txt']);
if (rowLockWaits > 0) issues.push([String(issues.length + 1), 'Row lock waits detected', String(rowLockWaits) + ' waits', 'Medium', 'Review transaksi panjang, locking pattern, dan query write contention.', hostname, 'mariadb_glob_vars.txt']);
if (replicationHealth === 'Not Synced') issues.push([String(issues.length + 1), 'Replication not synced', 'Slave_IO_Running=' + (repl.slaveIoRunning || slaveKv.Slave_IO_Running || 'N/A') + ', Slave_SQL_Running=' + (repl.slaveSqlRunning || slaveKv.Slave_SQL_Running || 'N/A'), 'High', 'Cek error replica, relay log, dan Seconds_Behind_Master.', hostname, 'slave_status.txt']);
if (!issues.length) issues.push(['1', 'No critical issue detected from filtered PM data', 'Tidak ada indikator critical dari data yang tersedia.', 'Low', 'Tetap lakukan review berkala dan lengkapi data N/A.', hostname, collectionProfile]);

const diskTableRows = diskRows.length
  ? diskRows.map((row) => [row.filesystem, row.size, row.used, row.free, row.pct, row.mount])

const summaryText = 'Report ini dibuat otomatis dari data PM archive, difilter sesuai kebutuhan template: OS information, DB check, system performance metrics, MariaDB performance metrics, master-replica, Galera, backup, dan known issues. Analisis AI memakai Ollama lokal agar data sensitif tidak dikirim ke external AI.';
const aiClean = clean(aiResp || 'N/A', 28000);
const sarEvidence = clean(perf.sarEvidence || sarText || 'N/A', 9000);
const metricWindowDays = 30;
const cpuSeries30d = buildSarMetricSeries(sarText, 'cpu', metricWindowDays);
const memorySeries30d = buildSarMetricSeries(sarText, 'memory', metricWindowDays);
const backupEvidence = clean(focused.backup?.evidence || backupText || 'N/A', 4000);
if (reportPeriod === 'N/A' && cpuSeries30d.period) reportPeriod = cpuSeries30d.period;

const html = [];

  ['Source Archive', sourceArchive]
]));

  ['GTID Current Pos', repl.gtidCurrentPos || gtidKv.gtid_current_pos || 'N/A'],
  ['Galera Status', galeraStatus],
  ['Max Connections', String(maxConn)],

]));

html.push(renderDatabaseSize(sections['db_size.txt']));
html.push('<h2>Table Engine Inventory</h2>');

  ['innodb_buffer_pool_size', cnfKv.innodb_buffer_pool_size || globVars.innodb_buffer_pool_size || 'N/A'],

]));
html.push('<h2>Mysqltuner</h2>');

html.push('<h2>REPLICATION *) jika ada</h2>');

html.push(kvTable([
  ['Slave_IO_Running', repl.slaveIoRunning || slaveKv.Slave_IO_Running || 'N/A'],
  ['Slave_SQL_Running', repl.slaveSqlRunning || slaveKv.Slave_SQL_Running || 'N/A'],
  ['Seconds_Behind_Master', repl.secondsBehindMaster || slaveKv.Seconds_Behind_Master || 'N/A'],

]));
html.push('<h3>CLUSTER STATUS*) jika ada</h3>');

  ['wsrep_cluster_size', repl.wsrepClusterSize || clusterKv.wsrep_cluster_size || 'N/A'],

  ['wsrep_local_state_comment', repl.wsrepLocalState || clusterKv.wsrep_local_state_comment || 'N/A'],

]));
html.push('<h3>CLUSTER INTEGRITY STATUS</h3>');

html.push('<h2>AI Analysis and Recommendations</h2>');
